headline: Merck (MRK) Could Be 4% Undervalued As LIPFENDRA Approval Tests Its Premium Valuation
summary: Merck (MRK) is back in focus for investors after the US Food and Drug Administration approved LIPFENDRA, the first oral PCSK9 inhibitor. This adds a new cardiovascular drug to the company’s portfolio. See our latest analysis for Merck. Merck’s share price is $127.47, with a 30-day share price return of 10.38% and a year-to-date share price return of 19.75%. headline: The 5th Annual Connected Worker Manufacturing Summit Returns Bigger Than Ever with Its Largest Speaker Faculty, Expo Hall and Industry Audience to Date
summary: The organizers of the Connected Worker Manufacturing Summit are excited to announce the return of North America's only event dedicated exclusively to Connected Worker and Digital Transformation in Manufacturing. Taking place on October 13-15 at the Westin North Shore, the 2026 edition will bring together 450+ manufacturing leaders for the largest Summit in the event's history.

headline: Agilent Receives EU Approval for PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx in Epithelial Ovarian, Fallopian Tube, or Primary Peritoneal Carcinoma
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., July 23, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced it has received European Union (EU) certification for PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx, Code SK006, as a companion diagnostic indicated to aid in identifying patients with epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal carcinoma, whose tumors express PD-L1 and who may be eligible for treatment with KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab), Merck’s (known as MSD outside the United States and Canada) anti-PD-1 therapy.

raw.headline: Agilent Receives EU Approval for PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx in Epithelial Ovarian, Fallopian Tube, or Primary Peritoneal Carcinoma

headline: Big Pharma Is Buying Growth. Novartis (NVS) Is Betting on Its Pipeline
summary: Big Pharma is buying its way out of the patent cliff, while Novartis AG (NYSE:NVS) is trying to out-develop it. A Record Year for Biotech Deals The scale of that buying activity appears in this year’s deal totals. Biotech M&A has hit a record pace in 2026, with deal value reaching $216 billion so far […]
